transcript.text:
You're really gonna eat 2?
I don't think you can...
(You can't finish that..!)
(There's so much...!!) It's too much
(Appetizing marinated grilled duck)
I'll go ahead and eat now
(Enjoying a whole griddle of marinated grilled duck outside)
(Can't miss out on the fried rice!)
(Lightly cleared)
I can't believe it!
Did you hide it somewhere?!
(They can't believe this...) I can't believe it, where did it all go?
Hello, everyone
I'm near Seoul Grand Park
(Line 4 Seoul Grand Park) in Gwacheon today
I came here because I heard this place

has a great view
and I can eat marinated grilled duck outside
It's marinated grilled duck and it comes out on a huge griddle
So
(Popular Gwacheon restaurant with lots of good reviews) the food looked delicious and they had a lot of reviews
It's very popular in Gwacheon so I came here
It opens
at 5 so I came here at 5
But there are people waiting already even though it's a weekday
('Seoul Grand Park Vineyard', Gwacheon Gyeonggi) It's this place, ta-da
It's 'Seoul Grand Park Vineyard'
(Spacious place where nature and tradition co-exists) It looks very traditional but the vibe is amazing
Can I get your name?
- I have to subscribe and like! - Oh really?
I'm Tzuyang...
- Tzuyang?! - Yes

(How did I not recognize you...?) Really? You're very famous
- People say it's really delicious here - Oh really?
- It's known as a good restaurant! - A good restaurant?
(This is a famous restaurant!) My whole company came to have a workshop here
Really?
(Scan)
(Yes, you are) Am I going to be in the video?
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
(Oh my)
You are so slim in real life...
Oh, do you know me? Haha
Haha of course!
(Marinated grilled duck 39,000 / Roasted duck 39,000) (Only 2 dishes on the menu)
(Marinated grilled duck 39,000 / Roasted duck 39,000) You only have marinated grilled duck and roasted duck?
How many servings can go on one griddle?
3-4 servings!

You can't do like 10 servings...?
(Nope...) Oh really? All right then
(Sitting outside to enjoy the nature) It looks amazing, there's a forest right there
It feels like you're eating in nature
I think this is the perfect weather to come here
(May, the perfect time to eat outside) You gotta come when the weather is like this
It's not too hot or cold, it's perfect
I heard this place gets packed
(Popular place) during weekends
Ma'am,
I can only get up to 2, right?
1 duck is 3-4 servings
If we add more in,
there will be too much oil!
The best way to eat it is to grill 1 duck
- at a time - Oh I see

You eat..
a lot, so
(She'll give the rest cooked!) I'll cook some and move it here
Then, I'll get...
(2 marinated grilled duck) 2 marinated grilled duck
Wow, amazing
You're face is this small!
(Annoyed)
(1 duck is more than I thought...) There's a lot
(By yourself?) Really?
(Everyone is amazing at her small head...) Your head is so small, how can you eat all of this?
- You're gonna eat 2 ducks? - Pardon?
(No way...) I don't think you can
I think I can eat 2 ducks...
(Try it, I'm not taking any responsibility) Try it, try 1 duck first...
(Why she was annoyed before) Cuz you're so pretty...

You're so thin...
I'm so jealous haha
Oh my, you're so pretty....
I wish I was pretty like you...
(Consistency is my pride...) I was chubby since I was a baby
(2 sets of cutlery) I'm gonna be eating alone!
- Oh really...? - Yes
You can eat with her too... Haha
(Alone...?)
(Unbelievable!)
(Marinated grilled duck is being cooked deliciously) Looks delicious
In the reviews,
it said that you must have fried rice after
(Essential for today) I'll have fried rice today
(Scene-stealer) Are you grilling 2 at once?
- Why are you so thin?! - No

Oh, I really
love you...!
(Wrist)
It looks like it's gonna break
You must feel good when you wake up in the morning...
(What should I eat today...?) I'm pretty sure you get a lot of those days
I'm on a diet right now
but girls like you...
(Offended) must not diet ever
(I'm sorry I don't gain weight...) I'm sorry
(Meanwhile, the marinated grilled duck is getting nicely cooked)
I think I can eat
one tteok!
The tteok is so good
Bon appétit
I didn't say that

Bon appétit
The marinade is so delicious
(Another lady is here)
I'm the owner!
I saw you on TV many times!
Oh really? Haha
Grill the kimchi in the oil, it's more delicious
- Grill it here? - Yeah
(Kimchi made by the owner herself!) I made it all
Thank you
Wow, grill the kimchi here?
(Adding kimchi) Looks delicious
Let me grab a bunch of duck
It's delicious....!
It's chewy and
tender, it's so nice

The marinade is insane
(Thumbs up)
(Automatic thumbs up for the delicious food) Thumbs up! Is it good?
Yes, it's the best
The marinade is delicious
so that's it
It cannot be....
It cannot be not delicious
(Hot)
(I can sacrifice my tongue but not the duck...) Wow, I just burnt my tongue but didn't spit it out
(Added 1 more duck) Thank you
(Huge amount of food with the additional duck) Can you finish 2 ducks?
- Eat the potatoes at the very end - Okay
(Full)
(Two ducks) I'll get started!
Delicious

(Slightly too hot to wear a hoodie) Wow, the weather is really hot
I'll put my hair behind my ears
I can't miss out on veggie wraps
Garlic!
When there was only 1 duck,
it didn't look like a lot
(Two ducks are just another level..) Two ducks are definitely a lot
It's too hot!
(Help) Help me
I'm very hot
but the weather is perfect for this
because whenever the wind blows,
it's so refreshing
Oh, so cool!
(Give me strength, wind!)
She told me to eat the potatoes at the end

But there's one that's well-cooked
It's so good
You know how good it is when you
mash the potatoes at the end with fried rice, right?
Kimchi grilled in duck oil!
So delicious!
It's insane!!
(The fermented kimchi is amazing..!) I want to take this kimchi home with me
You gotta have perilla leaves with duck!
(Refreshing perilla leaf wrap!)
As expected, perilla leaves go well with duck!
Should I scoop up some?
(Fan ON)
PD, you didn't do it on purpose, huh?!
(Telling the truth) It's not coming to me now...
(This guy...)

(Negotiation complete) We can share it then
(Hot) I'll tie my hair
The vibe definitely does
most of it for this restaurant
There's Seoul Grand Park
(Seoul Grand Park Vineyard) right next door
(Let's Run Park, Seoul Land, Seoul Grand Park) There is also Seoul Racecourse Park
There's lots to see
You can go and enjoy all the places
(After enjoying all the attractions) and then eat dinner here
(Perfect place for dinner..) Then, that will be the perfect day!
Actually...
(Actually)
(The ladies are great with reactions.. Haha) I was gonna surprised the ladies
and have 1-2 more
but I want fried rice now

I'm excited for the fried rice
(Enjoying the late spring with the great scenery)
This is amazing
(Checking the sweater)
(This is a routine for her now..) I couldn't save the sweater today as well
Put it here
Delicious
I think I can eat the potatoes now
(It's here) They should be cooked, right?
(Not there anymore)
(Ah...)
The marinade is
not sweet so I like it
It's slightly spicy
It's...
like Shin Ramyun level of spicy

The flavor
is very strong
but as the potato gets mashed, it becomes savory
Should I have the rest with
the fried rice?
(It's finally time for fried rice...) I'll have another scoop and have the rest with fried rice
Ma'am, can I have the fried rice...?
(Shocked) This pretty girl ate it all!
Oh my gosh!
(She nagged her on behalf of the viewers) You should've worn an apron!
Can I get fried rice?
(I need to tell them)
She ate it all!!
Hah!
And she's still not full!!
Really..?!

(Shocked) It's unbelievable
(Unbelievable eating capacity...)
(Fried rice) I have the fried rice
(The reason why they put two sheets of foil.mov) Oh, like that!
(Add)
(Can't miss out on the fried rice)
Looks so delicious
(It was a good idea to order fried rice quickly)
It'll make crispy noises!
- Then you can eat it haha - Okay
(It's making the crispy sound)
Oh, you really finished it all?
(Everyone drops by to check on her) Oh, you're eating fried rice now?
- (A gift for you) - Thank you
(So sweet of her to open it...)
You drink a lot of sodas too...

Is the fried rice ready?
Yeah, you can eat it
Oh really? Haha
(The fried rice got stuck on the foil) It's stuck!
(Gotta scrap the potato) It's potato fried rice now
Fried rice with mashed up potatoes
(Shocked)
Wow, the fried rice
is somehow sour(?)
(So touched that she said the wrong word) It's not sour, I said it wrong
Aromatic!
It's aromatic
and
unlike other fried rice,
it's...
It's..

It's less..
It's..
It's less oily
It's so delicious...!
(Looking back at the past while cooling it down..)
(I envy you)
Ah hot
With rice
and meat!
(If I didn't eat it, I would have regretted it...) You'll definitely regret it if you don't have fried rice
- You really finished it all? - Yes, I'm almost done
5 Sprites!
Thank you
I didn't open it!
You should open it now, haha
(Totally got teased..) You're amazing!

(Got knocked out by her skillful hand motion...) I thought she opened it, she got me there!
(Can't leave anything behind)
It feels like I'm eating chips
Last bite
(Complete) The end
(All the ladies came out after)
(Tzuyang is the best!) Tzuyang is the best!
Let me feel your belly
(Checking the belly)
(Wow) There is no belly!
When we eat,
(Full) we get this big
- Did you enjoy it? Haha - Yes, I enjoyed it haha
(It was a great meal!) I had an amazing meal today!
- Thank you - Thank you
Anyway,

I had a great meal today
(Unexpected inspection) Time for inspection!
(Let me take a look) Where did it go? Did you throw it away or something?!
(Investigation is on..) Where is it? Come on! Where are you hiding it?
I can't believe it!!
Are you sure you didn't hide it?
(I cannot understand this!) No way! Where did all the food go?!
You can't do that, sis! Not fair!
(Very relaxed..)
(Can't believe they're mom and daughter...) Why didn't you make me like that?
(Curious about her dad now...) I'm going to be born like her in the next life
